title: hutchinsia calycina
intro: Hutchinsia calycina, also known as the broom moss, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Ericaceae. It is primarily found in alpine and Arctic regions, and its medicinal properties have been valued for centuries due to its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content. The plant is known to exhibit various health benefits, including anti-arthritic and anti-oxidative effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of arthritis and protect against cell damage. Hutchinsia calycina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
